center.name: Andrew Smith (zoologist)
center.summary: Andrew Smith (zoologist)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联15种鸟类，包括Swainson's spurfowl、Swamp nightjar、African barred owlet等15种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The African barred owlet (Glaucidium capense) is a species of small owl in the family Strigidae found in much of southern, central and eastern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Agricola infuscatus |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22709040A263876477 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22709040A263876477.en |access-date=12 February 2025}} | genus = Agricola | species = infuscatus | authority = (Smith, A, 1839) | synonyms = Bradornis infuscatusMelaenornis infuscatusSaxicola infuscata }} The chat flycatcher (Agricola infuscatus) is a small passerine bird in the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae that is native to southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: phoeniceus | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Euplectes | species = axillaris | authority = (Smith, 1838) | synonyms = }} The fan-tailed widowbird (Euplectes axillaris), also known as the red-shouldered widowbird, is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae, which is native to grassy and swampy areas of the tropical and subtropical Afrotropics

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The lark-like bunting (Emberiza impetuani) is a species of bird in the family Emberizidae, which is native to south-western Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Levaillant's cisticola (Cisticola tinniens), also known as the tinkling cisticola, is a small passerine bird which is native to marshlands in the uplands of Africa, southwards of the equator

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Bradornis mariquensis |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22709044A263874053 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22709044A263874053.en |access-date=28 May 2025}} | genus = Bradornis | species = mariquensis | authority = Smith, 1847 | synonyms = Melaenornis mariquensis }} The Marico flycatcher or Mariqua flycatcher (Bradornis mariquensis) is a passerine bird in the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae that is found in areas of southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Marico sunbird (Cinnyris mariquensis) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae, which is native to woodlands of the eastern and southern Afrotropics.The bird is typically found in the southeast of the continent of Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: humilis song recorded in Kenya | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Cisticola | species = chiniana | authority = (Smith, 1843) | synonyms = }} The rattling cisticola (Cisticola chiniana) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae which is native to Africa south of the equator, and parts of East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Swainson's spurfowl or Swainson's francolin (Pternistis swainsonii) is a species of bird in the family Phasianidae which is native to southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The swamp nightjar or Natal nightjar (Caprimulgus natalensis) is a crepuscular and nocturnal bird in the nightjar family found in Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: melanorhynchus, Lake Baringo, Kenya | image2 = White-browed Sparrow Weaver (Plocepasser mahali) (022A-WA03044X0028-0011M0).ogg | image2_caption = Song recorded in southwest Kenya | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | taxon = Plocepasser mahali | authority = Smith, 1836 }} The white-browed sparrow-weaver (Plocepasser mahali) is a predominantly brown, sparrow-sized bird found throughout central and north-central southern Africa. It is found in groups of two to eleven individuals consisting of one breeding pair and other non-reproductive individuals

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The melodious lark (Mirafra cheniana) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-fronted bee-eater (Merops bullockoides) is a species of bee-eater widely distributed in sub-equatorial Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The African pygmy falcon (Polihierax semitorquatus)—or simply pygmy falcon—is a diminutive raptor native to eastern and southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The African wood owl (Strix woodfordii) or Woodford's owl, is a typical owl from the genus Strix in the family Strigidae and is arguably the most common forest owl in Africa. It inhabits wooded areas and possesses a distinctive call
